The '''Derilyn Space Defense Platform''', or simply '''Derilyn Platform''', was built by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]].<ref name="PotG3" />

==Description==
This platform had two saucer-shaped sections connected by a thick central fuselage and measured 4,225 meters in length. It was armed with 80 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries and 40 double turbolaser cannons along with the ability to house twelve [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] worth of [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]]. It could hold enough supplies to run for five years.<ref name="PotG3" />

==History==
This huge space station was placed in orbit around [[Derilyn]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], when it took control of [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].<ref name="PotG3" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Derilyn Space Defense Platform was first mentioned in the [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|Roleplaying Game]] book ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' and was featured in the subsequent RPG adventure [[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]. The Derilyn Platform was also present in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', in the mission "Deep Space Strike Evaluation". In the game, the platform has the same appearance than in the West End Games books but with very different characteristics, such as a length of 757 meters.
